Description: Without using a loop, input three integers.
Determine which quotients of the two numbers from the three numbers entered are not zero, ensuring its divisor also not zero.
Include all the non-zero remainders that satisfy the conditions above into the average.
If such an average exists, print out the average.
Using a loop, Input a sequence of integer pairs (a and b) until any integer entered is zero.
For each pair, determine which quotient of the pairs entered (a and b) is not zero.
Include all the non-zero remainders into the average whenever that condition is true.
Print out the average if such an average exists.
Enter a sequence of integers until two identical numbers are entered continuously - setting valid previous value.
Maximum number with an increasing last digit: find the MAXIMUM of the numbers entered in increasing order when its last digit is in increasing order compared to the previous number.
Minimum number with a decreasing last digit: find the MINIMUM of the numbers entered when its last digit is in decreasing order compared to the previous number.
Print out the number of values (count) entered that lie between these minimum and maximum values if such maximum and minimum points exist in the sequence of numbers entered.
